meaning: In January only, at 00:00, on the 1st of the month OR on any Sunday (inclusive OR; both January and 00:00 apply to both conditions).

meaning: In the months January, March, May, July, September and November only, at 00:00, on every other day of the month OR on Sundays, Tuesdays, Thursdays and Saturdays. (The month list AND 00:00 apply to BOTH conditions; the month list must appear ONCE, not be repeated on each arm.)
